hero.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
hero.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day of new beginnings. Opportunities will arise that may seem uncertain, but trust yourself and your instincts.
aries.love: Romantic sparks are in the air, be open to new connections or deepening existing bonds.
aries.career: A great day for networking. Reach out to old contacts and make new ones.

taurus.general: Stability is your focus today. Look for ways to enhance your surroundings, both at home and work.
taurus.love: Communication will strengthen your relationship today; express your feelings frankly.
taurus.career: Be patient with slow progress at work; your steady approach will pay off.

gemini.general: A burst of creativity will inspire you today. Don't hesitate to share your ideas with others.
gemini.love: Expect surprises in your love life — spontaneity is key!
gemini.career: Collaboration is your strength today; work within a team to achieve your goals.

cancer.general: Intuitive insights will guide you today; trust your gut feelings.
cancer.love: Emotional depth can transform your relationships into something meaningful.
cancer.career: Focus on your long-term goals as obstacles may challenge you today.

leo.general: Today is a day for self-expression and showcasing your talents. Let your light shine!
leo.love: Your charisma attracts admirers; enjoy the attention but choose wisely.
leo.career: Take charge in a group setting; your leadership skills will shine.

virgo.general: Details will matter today. Pay attention to the fine print in anything you undertake.
virgo.love: Practicality in romantic gestures can strengthen bonds.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be appreciated at work; don’t hesitate to offer solutions.

libra.general: Harmony and balance are key themes today; seek to resolve any conflicts with grace.
libra.love: Open communication will enhance your romantic connections today.
libra.career: Focus on partnerships; collaborations will bring fruitful results.

scorpio.general: Emotions run deep today. It’s a good time to explore your inner feelings and desires.
scorpio.love: Passion will be heightened; embrace intense moments with your partner.
scorpio.career: Leverage your resourcefulness; it will lead you to success in intricate projects.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Seek out new experiences and broaden your horizons.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneous adventures could lead to exciting developments in love.
sagittarius.career: Take risks today; your adventurous nature can lead to valuable breakthroughs.

capricorn.general: Hard work pays off today; stay focused on your responsibilities and goals.
capricorn.love: Your dedication to your partner will deepen your connection.
capricorn.career: Consider strategic moves in your career; calculated risks will lead to rewards.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flow easily today. Don’t hesitate to think outside the box.
aquarius.love: A refreshing conversation could revive your relationship dynamics.
aquarius.career: Embrace collaboration for creative projects; teamwork breeds innovation.

pisces.general: A day of reflection and emotional insight awaits; take some time for yourself.
pisces.love: Intuition will guide your romantic decisions; trust in your feelings.
pisces.career: Creative tasks will thrive in your hands today; embrace your imaginative side.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: If you want to achieve greatness, stop asking for permission.
professional.author: Anonymous

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
motivation.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
motivation.author: Thomas Jefferson

motivation.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
motivation.author: Robert Collier

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay humble.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
captions.author: Oscar Wilde

captions.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: In a world where you can be anything, be kind.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Stay close to what makes you feel alive.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Information technology and business are becoming inextricably interwoven.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me Kit Kats.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I would avoid the sushi if I were you. It’s a little fishy.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they'll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Faith is not believing that God can. It is knowing that He will.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
faith.author: Deepak Chopra

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: It is not what you look at that matters, it's what you see.
wisdom.author: Henry David Thoreau

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain
